body:
## Plan & Design — READY FOR PLAN-EVAL

MEASURE-FIRST complete. All findings re-baselined against the 4a+4b-merged umbrella (`1896f854`).

### MEASURE-FIRST table (per entrypoint)

**`@netscript/plugin-sagas-core` (19 entrypoints)**

| Entrypoint | ptr | jsdoc | total |
|-----------|-----|-------|-------|
| `./mod.ts` | 17 | 0 | 17 |
| `./src/abstracts/mod.ts` | 27 | 24 | 51 |
| `./src/adapters/mod.ts` | 23 | 23 | 46 |
| `./src/agent/mod.ts` | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| `./src/builders/mod.ts` | 14 | 0 | 14 |
| `./src/config/mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./src/contracts/v1/mod.ts` | 19 | 18 | 37 |
| `./src/domain/mod.ts` | 0 | 4 | 4 |
| `./src/integration/publisher/mod.ts` | 6 | 3 | 9 |
| `./src/integration/workers/mod.ts` | 8 | 2 | 10 |
| `./src/middleware/mod.ts` | 14 | 5 | 19 |
| `./src/ports/mod.ts` | 35 | 40 | 75 |
| `./src/presets/mod.ts` | 5 | 2 | 7 |
| `./src/runtime/mod.ts` | 58 | 48 | 106 |
| `./src/stores/mod.ts` | 11 | 8 | 19 |
| `./src/streams/mod.ts` | 4 | 0 | 4 |
| `./src/telemetry/mod.ts` | 6 | 53 | 59 |
| `./src/testing/mod.ts` | 34 | 43 | 77 |
| `./src/transports/mod.ts` | 24 | 84 | 108 |
| **TOTAL** | **48** | **349** | **397** |

**`@netscript/plugin-sagas` (12 entrypoints)**

| Entrypoint | ptr | jsdoc | total |
|-----------|-----|-------|-------|
| `./contracts/v1/mod.ts` | 17 | 26 | 43 |
| `./mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./services/src/main.ts` | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| `./src/aspire/mod.ts` | 7 | 0 | 7 |
| `./src/cli/mod.ts` | 11 | 7 | 18 |
| `./src/e2e/mod.ts` | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| `./src/plugin/mod.ts` | 11 | 0 | 11 |
| `./src/public/mod.ts` | 11 | 3 | 14 |
| `./src/runtime/mod.ts` | 16 | 6 | 22 |
| `./src/scaffolding/mod.ts` | 0 | 6 | 6 |
| `./streams/mod.ts` | 5 | 0 | 5 |
| `./streams/server.ts` | 6 | 3 | 9 |
| **TOTAL** | **71** | **51** | **122** |

**Family total: 519** (48 ptr + 349 jsdoc core + 71 ptr + 51 jsdoc plugin).

- Both `deno publish --dry-run --allow-dirty` → **PASS** (0 slow types).
- `deno check --unstable-kv` all 31 entrypoints → **PASS** (exit 0).

### Archetype + split decisions

| Decision | Locked value | Rationale |
|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Core archetype | **A3 (Runtime/Behavior)** | SagaEngine + SagaScheduler + state transitions + transport implementations + composition root = long-running stateful behavior |
| Plugin archetype | **A5 (Plugin Package)** | First-party plugin manifest, services, Aspire, CLI, scaffolding |
| Split | **4c-core / 4c-plugin** | 519 doc-lint + 31 entrypoints + 3 over-cap + 0-test plugin = ~27 slices; split gives headroom + respects dependency order |
| F-3 layering | **CLEAN** | Transports swappable behind `SagaTransportPort`; `stores/` is a deliberate pass-through barrel |
| F-1 splits | **3 files** | `v1.ts` (715) → handlers + helpers + types; `redis-transport.ts` (480) → class + commands; `list-transport.ts` (453) → class + commands |

### Slice count

- **4c-core**: 14 slices (C1–C14)
- **4c-plugin**: 13 slices (P1–P13)
- **Total: 27** (< 30 per sub-wave)

### PLAN-EVAL routing

**Option A**: One PLAN-EVAL over the combined plan, then separate IMPL-EVAL per sub-wave.

Artifacts: `research.md` + `plan.md` + `measure-doc-lint-{core,plugin}.json` + updated `drift.md` + `worklog.md`.

**Do NOT begin implementation. PLAN-EVAL is a separate session.**
@openhands-agent model=openrouter/qwen/qwen3.7-max output=pr-comment use harness proceed to PLAN-EVAL for this PR.

<!-- openhands-agent-summary -->
